ideation: This sequence depicts a robot admiring Mount Fuji, starting with arms at its side, then raising them in awe, and finally bringing them down in a contemplative pose. The sequence aims for a slow, deliberate, and respectful portrayal of the gesture, mirroring the majesty of the mountain. Frame 1 begins with a neutral pose. Frame 2 shows both arms rising, palms facing each other in a gesture of reverence. Frame 3 shows the arms raised slightly higher, emphasizing the awe. Frame 4 brings the arms down slowly, palms still facing each other, in a contemplative gesture. Frame 5 ends with arms at the sides, in a relaxed pose.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready for the view
arms rise slowly, palms facing in reverence
arms lift higher, in awe of the majestic mountain
arms descend slowly, a moment of contemplation
arms return to rest, the vision fades
